title: Vinsani Latte Spoons, Set of 4 Long Handle Spoons, Stainless Steel Coffee Spoons Tea Spoon Ideal for Latte Coffee, Espresso, Hot Chocolate, Hot Drinks, Dessert & Ice Cream Sundae - 7.8 inch (Silver)
features: EXQUISITE WORKMANSHIP: 4 piece latte spoon set features slender, smooth, rounded handles with elegant curves. Perfectly balanced. Made from the finest quality of stainless steel with a lustrous polished mirror finish.
ELEGANT YET SIMPLE DESIGN: 4 piece long handle latte spoons with simple appearance, classic design to fit any style of kitchen dinner.
DURABLE QUALITY - The stainless steel flatware is light weight. Well designed to provide a comfortable grip. Suitable for both everyday and formal use
4 PIECE SET: This Flatware Set will never rust. 4 Piece long handle stainless steel latte spoons packed in a elegant gift Box.

MULTIFUNCTION: Flatware set is perfect for daily use, gathering, parties, theme restaurant or family dinner, camping or when you need extra cutlery set. Ideal for Kitchen, Hotel and Restaurant, also a great gift
description: Product Description High Quality Spoons 4 piece latte spoon set features slender, smooth, rounded handles with elegant curves. Perfectly balanced. Made from the finest quality of stainless steel with a lustrous polished mirror finish Each latte spoon measures 20 x 3 cm. Latte spoons can be used as ice cream scoops, teaspoons, coffee spoons, cocktail stir spoons... Ideal tool for mixing drinks, beverages, smoothies or shakes Suitable for personal use, or gift to friends and family. Ideal for Kitchen, Hotel and Restaurant, also a great gift Set of 4 Spoons Finish polished stainless steel Dishwasher safe Lightweight and comfortable grip Packed in a elegant gift Box Elegant yet simple design
